title: Her Silent Christmas Alibi
tagline: Love lives here. So does arson.
theme: Silence is just fear wearing cashmere.
omen: a child saying mommy was loud last night when she was alone

cast.name: Gavin Dane
traits: still apologizes before telling the truth
flinches at charm delivered too smoothly
can identify gaslighting by sentence three
secret_capacity: kept every voicemail because no one believed her the first time
cast.regional_responsibility: has keys to a church annex
cast.space_description: storage unit described as retreat supplies

cast.name: Daniel Bell
traits: hides something imprecise
briefly leaves the room after difficult questions
sighs heavily
secret_capacity: was in the wrong county on the wrong night
has a storage unit he refuses to explain
cast.regional_responsibility: organizes a fundraiser with tense undertones
cast.space_description: dock office with a desk nobody fully claims

cast.name: Sienna Dane
traits: says the dangerous thing out loud
appears exactly when gossip is needed
drinks aggressively
secret_capacity: once hid a casserole dish containing evidence
cast.regional_responsibility: serves on a board no one fully understands
cast.space_description: church basement described as donation overflow

cast.name: Derek Vale
traits: seems one kitchen confession away from headline syntax
says he would not stop in a way nobody enjoys hearing twice
has slept four hours across a week
secret_capacity: rehearsed a self-defense story before anything was proven
cast.regional_responsibility: is trusted to lock up after emotionally charged events
cast.space_description: marina tackle room described as old family things

cast.name: Rachel Lark
traits: emotionally constipated
forgot a recital once and never recovered
allowed one lake monologue
secret_capacity: ignored a warning text on the worst possible night
cast.regional_responsibility: is trusted to lock up after emotionally charged events
cast.space_description: church basement described as paperwork I have not gone through yet

cast.name: Luke Vale
traits: makes competence look like denial
says she is fine in a voice that needs legal counsel
keeps a color-coded calendar and a cracked heart
secret_capacity: saw one text too many and said nothing for three weeks
cast.regional_responsibility: has keys to a church annex
cast.space_description: old storm shelter from before the divorce

cast.name: Evelyn Marlowe
traits: distrusts every man immediately
emotionally precise
notices timeline errors before adults do

cast.name: Cole Pruitt
traits: hovers between competence and grief
definitely has rain-scene potential
knows the old case too well

beat_sheet.text: Gavin Dane relocates to Bellweather after an emotionally negligent implosion and pretends work explains everything while quietly inheriting storage unit described as retreat supplies. contradiction_ledger.entry: Daniel Bell is called Daniel in one kitchen scene and Derek during the rain argument.
Gavin Dane says Bellweather is in Vermont, then calls it outside Atlanta after two glasses of wine.
A dead best friend appears at brunch and nobody agrees whether this is denial, evil, or scheduling.
The basement belongs to a condo, a lake house, and an abandoned vineyard at different times in Blackthorn Lake.

dialogue_samples: "You think because you wear flannel and own a dock light I am supposed to trust you, Daniel?"
"Mothers do not disappear, Evelyn. They evaporate into paperwork."
"I checked his social media likes, Gavin. Nobody who enjoys motivational quotes is innocent."
"The scarf with impossible timing is not decorative anymore and you know it."
"Trust is just fear with a casserole dish, Derek."
"You seem upset," he said, making tea in a way that felt prosecutable.
"If that basement is innocent, why does it sound defensive?"
"I did not lie. I just told the truth in the order this town could survive."
fake_critic_blurb: "Her Silent Christmas Alibi understands that menace is a regional utility." - County Suspense Quarterly
sequel_hook: Channel 8 Night Report hints that the vineyard fire had a witness who still hosts brunch.
synopsis: Inspired by true events in the emotional sense only, "Her Silent Christmas Alibi" follows Gavin Dane, an overextended professional woman who mistakes productivity for safety until widow maybe lying maybe surviving collides with Daniel Bell, a comforting regional adult carrying portable suspicion and plausible access to offsite storage. As a child saying mommy was loud last night when she was alone, Blackthorn County reveals once again that every secret comes home and every adult has somewhere emotionally alarming to stand in silence. Love lives here. So does arson.
